source_pr.title: plan/core: support mpp group by expressions.
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tics/issues/1475

Problem Summary:
mpp cannot process group by expressions correctly
### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
Since mpp only allow shuffled by columns, for two kinds of aggregation:
- phase 1. not support group by expressions
- phase 2. always shuffled by group by **evaluated** column

Then refine the cost of phase 2 aggregation.

### Related changes


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test. Yet added. Wait for another pr being merged.


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- plan/core: support mpp group by expressions.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("select count(*) k, t2.b+1 from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a group by t2.b+1 order by k").Check(testkit.Rows("1 <nil>", "3 1")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("select count(*) k, t2.b+1 from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a group by t2.b+1 order by k").Check(testkit.Rows("1 <nil>", "3 1")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("select count(*) k, t2.b+1 from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a group by t2.b+1 order by k").Check(testkit.Rows("1 <nil>", "3 1")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("select count(*) k, t2.b+1 from t1 left join t2 on t1.a = t2.a group by t2.b+1 order by k").Check(testkit.Rows("1 <nil>", "3 1")) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
